task:
A pre-seeded Zotero library is at /home/user/Zotero/zotero.sqlite. The library currently contains two items titled 'Attention Is All You Need' — one has DOI `10.48550/arXiv.1706.03762`, the other has no DOI.

Merge the two duplicate items into a single item, keeping the master with DOI `10.48550/arXiv.1706.03762` so the merged result retains that DOI. After merging, exactly one item titled 'Attention Is All You Need' must remain and it must have DOI `10.48550/arXiv.1706.03762`. Leave Zotero running.

verification.command: check-item-field 'Attention Is All You Need' DOI 10.48550/arXiv.1706.03762
verification.description: Remaining item has the correct DOI
